title: Continuous PPG-Based Blood Pressure Monitoring Using Multi-Linear Regression
authors: Serj Haddad, Assim Boukhayma, Antonino Caizzone
abstract: In this work, we present the Senbiosys blood pressure monitoring algorithm (SB-BPM) that solely requires a photoplethysmography (PPG) signal. The technology is based on pulse wave analysis (PWA) of PPG signals retrieved from different body locations to continuously estimate the systolic blood pressure (SBP) and the diastolic blood pressure (DBP).
